speaker: speaker1
text: Excuse me , I have something to trouble you .

speaker: speaker2
text: Yes ? I'll be very glad if I could be of any help to you .

speaker: speaker1
text: An hour ago , I bought this vase with my tourist .

speaker: speaker2
text: Oh , yes . I remember it clearly . Is there anything wrong with it ?

speaker: speaker1
text: I'm afraid so . We found this crack on the bottom when I went back to my hotel .

speaker: speaker2
text: Oh , how awful ! Let me have a look , I'm terribly sorry . It was most thoughtless of me . Would you excuse me , please ?

speaker: speaker1
text: Oh , It's quite all right , I suppose . It can't be helped sometimes .

speaker: speaker2
text: It's very kind of you to say so . How about changing another one for you ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Just a minute , please . I won't be long . I'm sure this one is perfect . You may examine it carefully .

speaker: speaker1
text: Oh , yes , it is . I'll take this one .

speaker: speaker2
text: I'm very sorry for any inconvenience I've caused you .

speaker: speaker1
text: Well , there's no reason to apologize for such a trifle thing .
